suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify the distinction between admin role-based access control (isAdmin checks using user?.role from useAuth()) and the development convenience isAdmin state used only for DevTools access. These serve different purposes and could cause confusion if not documented clearly.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: admin-features review flagged this: App.tsx uses 'isAdmin' state for F12 DevTools toggle only, while SyncSettingsPage.tsx uses 'const isAdmin = user?.role === "Administrator"' for production permission checks.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the sync system uses sql.js (pure JavaScript SQLite) while AGENTS.md specifies better-sqlite3 for the main database engine. This is an intentional deviation as sql.js provides better portability for the sync scenario (no native bindings needed for network file access).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: sync-system review noted: syncDatabase.ts uses 'import initSqlJs, { Database } from sql.js' while AGENTS.md specifies 'better-sqlite3'.

fixesApplied.resolution: fs.copyFileSync now copies database files to configured remote paths

summary: All blocking issues from round 1 have been resolved. The fix-sync-stubs feature implements actual file sync using fs.copyFileSync instead of the stub logging. All 3 features in sync milestone (sync-system, admin-features, fix-sync-stubs) now pass review. Validators (typecheck, lint, test) all pass.
